title: Saudi Riyad Bank launches SAR5bln AT1 sukuk offering
summary: The perpetual sukuk carries a fixed annual profit rate of 6.50%
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
Close up shoot for saudi riyal and coins in sacks bag, Islamic concept. Image used for illustrative purpose. Image courtesy: Getty Images/ imran kadir photography

The perpetual sukuk carries a fixed annual profit rate of 6.50%

Staff Writer ,  ZAWYA

Saudi Arabia’s Riyad Bank has commenced the public offering and subscription period for its Saudi riyal-denominated AT1 capital sukuk under its SAR10 billion ($2.7 billion) programme.
